responsibilities: Provide Level 2 desktop and application support to 800+ corporate staff
Manage Active Directory user accounts, group policies, and security groups
Administer Microsoft 365 including Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, and Intune
Troubleshoot network connectivity issues including LAN, Wi-Fi, and VPN
Escalate complex infrastructure issues to Level 3 team
Log and manage tickets in ServiceNow and maintain SLA compliance
Participate in hardware refresh projects including laptop imaging and SCCM deployments
Produce knowledge base articles and user guides

mustHaveSkills.name: Windows 10
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Strong knowledge of Windows 10/11 in a corporate environment

mustHaveSkills.name: ITIL Foundation
mustHaveSkills.rawText: ITIL Foundation certification (or willingness to obtain within 12 months)

workAuthorizationSignals: Applicants must have full working rights in Australia
summary: Level 2 IT support role in a large retail corporate environment. Requires strong M365, Active Directory, and ServiceNow experience. 100% onsite at Sydney CBD; Australian working rights required.
